title: GSC UI Indexing Requests — Phase 21
reason_held: Top 10 indexing targets need content improvements and verification before requesting indexing. Requesting indexing for unimproved thin pages wastes GSC quota and may hurt crawl budget.
eligibility_criteria: changed today (content improved or internal links added)
eligible_after_next_deploy: Pages receiving new internal links from indexed sources (20 links added in Task 9)
next_batch: After next deploy with internal links + content improvements deployed
do_not_request: Static pages without content value (privacy, terms, etc.)
